---
title: "plot evolutionary trajectory for multiple models"
author: "Andrea Chen"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: pdf_document
---

# parameter for plotting
```{r setup, include=FALSE}
dataset_name <- "various_group_size"
date <- "4_15"

# set these once for your machine / project
analysis_root <- "../zc524/collective_behavior_evo/figure/4_15_various_n"
base_plot_folder     <- file.path("../zc524/collective_behavior_evo/figure/plots", date)
r_data_folder    <- file.path("../zc524/collective_behavior_evo/figure", "r_data", dataset_name)

library(MetBrewer)

if (!dir.exists(base_plot_folder)) {
  dir.create(base_plot_folder, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
}

met_brewer_pallete <- "Austria"  # color pattern for lines
```

# load evolutionary trajectory data
```{r}
data_df <- readRDS(file.path(r_data_folder, "data_summary.rds"))
```

```{r}
data_df <- summary_stat_df
```

```{r}
norm_const <- 0.0087186
data_df$fitness_mean_norm <- data_df$fitness_mean / norm_const
```

```{r}


```

```{r}
colname = c("z_opt")  # column to plot
plot_folder = file.path(base_plot_folder, paste(colname, collapse = "_"), "/")

ltys = c(1, 2) # per ycol: solid, dashed

if (!dir.exists(plot_folder)) {
  dir.create(plot_folder, recursive = TRUE)
}

n=2
sz=60

# data_df <- summary_stat_df[summary_stat_df$tick < 10000, ]
# for (n in c(2, 3, 4, 5, 6, 7, 8, 9, 10, 20, 50)){
for (n in c(5, 8, 20)){
    for (sz in c(40)){
        for (reg in c("fit")){
            # for (reg in c("fit")){
                # for (opt in c(0, sz)){
                filt_A <- list(reg = reg, psi = 0.0, n = n, shift_size = sz)
                filt_B <- list(reg = reg, psi = 0.2, n = n, shift_size = sz)
                filt_C <- list(reg = reg, psi = 0.5, n = n, shift_size = sz)
                filt_D <- list(reg = reg, psi = 0.8, n = n, shift_size = sz)
                pdf(paste0(plot_folder, "reg_", reg, "_n_", n, "_sz_", sz, ".pdf"), width=11.5, height=8)

                title <- paste0(
                if (reg == "inv") "Homogenous group" else
                    if (reg == "fit") "Copy the Best" else
                    if (reg == "ext") "Copy the Extreme" else
                        if (reg == "ave") "Copy the Average",
                " model (n = ", n, ")"
                )

                par(cex.axis = 2.5, cex.lab = 2.5, cex.main = 1.0, mar = c(6, 6, 3, 1) + 0.2, mgp = c(3.8, 1.5, 0))
                fils <- list(filt_A, filt_B, filt_C, filt_D)
                plot_lines_multi(
                    df      = data_df,
                    filters = fils,
                    ycol    = colname,  # << choose the column to plot
                    labels  = list(
                        title = title,
                        x = "Generation",  # or any x label you want
                        y = "Distance to Optimum"      # or any y label you want
                    ),
                    show_rep = TRUE,       # faded per-rep lines? TRUE/FALSE
                    cols = met.brewer(name=met_brewer_pallete, n=length(fils), type="discrete"),
                    ylim = c(0, sz+5),
                    xlim = c(9990, 10150),
                    # xcol = "dz1"
                    ltys = ltys
                )
                
                abline(v=10000, lty = 2, col = "black", lwd = 4)

                leg_expr <- as.expression(lapply(fils, function(v) bquote(psi == .(v$psi))))
                legend("topright", bty = "n", legend = leg_expr,
                    col = met.brewer(name=met_brewer_pallete, n=length(fils), type="discrete"),
                    lwd = 3, cex = 2.2)
                dev.off()
                # }
        }
    }
}
```

```{r}

# psis <- c(0.0, 0.2, 0.5, 0.8)
psis <- c(0, 0.1, 0.2, 0.5, 0.8)
ns <- c(8)
szs <- c(20, 40, 60)
# regs <- c("ext", "fit", "ave")
regs <- c("fit")

data_df_partial <- data_df[
  data_df$tick >= 10000 &
  data_df$tick <= 10150 &
  data_df$n %in% ns &
  data_df$shift_size %in% szs &
  data_df$reg %in% regs &
  data_df$psi %in% psis,
]

plot_vs_n <- function(){
  # -----------------------------
  # plotting
  # -----------------------------
  pdf(file.path(plot_folder, paste0("reg_", reg, "_sz_", sz, ".pdf")),
      width = 11.5, height = 8)
  par(cex.axis = 2.5, cex.lab = 2.5, cex.main = 1.0, mar = c(6, 6, 3, 1) + 0.2, mgp = c(3.8, 1.5, 0))
  cols <- met.brewer(name = met_brewer_pallete, n = length(psi_vals), type = "discrete")
  
  # empty plot
  plot(
    n_vals, n_vals,
    type = "n",
    xlab = "Group size (n)",
    ylab = "Decay constant (k)",
    main = paste("Decay constant vs n | reg =", reg, "| sz =", sz),
    ylim = c(0.01, 0.045)
  )
  
  # draw each psi curve
  for (j in seq_along(psi_vals)) {
    
    psi_val <- psi_vals[j]
    df_plot <- decay_results_all[[as.character(psi_val)]]
    
    lines(
      df_plot$n,
      df_plot$k,
      type = "b",
      pch = 16,
      lwd = 2,
      col = cols[j]
    )
  }
  
  legend(
    "topright",
    legend = paste0("psi = ", psi_vals),
    col = cols,
    lwd = 2,
    pch = 16,
    bty = "n"
  )
  
  dev.off()
}

find_intersection_time <- function(A1, k1, A2, k2) {
  
  # validity checks
  if (!is.finite(A1) || !is.finite(A2) ||
      !is.finite(k1) || !is.finite(k2)) return(NA)
  
  if (A1 <= 0 || A2 <= 0) return(NA)
  
  if (abs(k2 - k1) < 1e-12) return(NA)  # parallel (no intersection)
  
  t_star <- log(A2 / A1) / (k2 - k1)
  
  if (!is.finite(t_star) || t_star < 0) return(NA)
  
  return(t_star)
}

```
```{r}
plot_folder = file.path(base_plot_folder, "decay_const")
dir.create(plot_folder, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

agg_df <- aggregate(
  z_opt ~ tick + n + reg + shift_size + psi,
  data = data_df_partial,
  FUN = mean
)

for (sz in szs) {
  for (reg in regs) {
    sub_agg_df <- agg_df[
      agg_df$shift_size == sz & agg_df$reg == reg, 
    ]
    
    psi_vals <- sort(unique(sub_agg_df$psi))
    n_vals <- sort(unique(sub_agg_df$n))
    
    # store all results
    decay_results_all <- list()
    
    for (psi_val in psi_vals) {
      
      sub_psi_df <- sub_agg_df[sub_agg_df$psi == psi_val, ]
      
      decay_results <- data.frame(
        n = n_vals,
        k = NA,
        a0 = NA,
        psi = psi_val
      )
      
      for (i in seq_along(n_vals)) {
        
        n_val <- n_vals[i]
        sub_df <- sub_psi_df[sub_psi_df$n == n_val, ]
        
        if (nrow(sub_df) == 0) next
        
        t <- sub_df$tick - min(sub_df$tick)
        y <- sub_df$z_opt
        
        keep <- is.finite(y) & y > 0
        t <- t[keep]
        y <- y[keep]
        
        if (length(y) < 5) next
        
        fit <- tryCatch(
          nls(
            y ~ A * exp(-k * t),
            start = list(A = max(y), k = 0.01)
          ),
          error = function(e) NULL
        )
        
        if (!is.null(fit)) {
          decay_results$k[i] <- coef(fit)["k"]
          decay_results$a0[i] <- coef(fit)["A"]
        }
      }
      
      decay_results_all[[as.character(psi_val)]] <- decay_results
    }
    
    pdf(file.path(plot_folder, paste0("decay_const_intercept_reg_", reg, "_sz_", sz, ".pdf")),
        width = 11.5, height = 8)
    # plot_vs_n()

    y_val <- c()
    base_line <- decay_results_all[["0"]]
    for (psi_val in psis) {
      if (psi_val == 0) next
      df_plot <- decay_results_all[[as.character(psi_val)]]
      
      if (is.null(df_plot)) next
      
      t_star <- find_intersection_time(
        A1 = base_line$a0,
        k1 = base_line$k,
        A2 = df_plot$a0,
        k2 = df_plot$k
      )
      y_val <- c(y_val, t_star)
    }
    print(y_val)
    par(mar = c(6, 6, 3, 1))
    plot(
      psis[psis != 0],
      y_val,
      type = "b",
      pch = 16,
      lwd = 2,
      col = "blue",
      xlab = expression(psi),
      ylab = "Estimated intersection time (generation)",
      main = paste("Intersection time vs psi\nreg =", reg, "| sz =", sz),
      xlim = c(0.1, 0.9),
      cex.lab = 2.0,
      cex.axis = 2.0
    )
    
    dev.off()
  }
}
```

```{r}
print(decay_results_all[["0"]])
```

```{r}
plot_folder <- file.path(base_plot_folder, "fit_diff_heatmap")
dir.create(plot_folder, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

# -----------------------------
# filter data
# -----------------------------
sub_df <- data_df_partial[
  data_df_partial$reg == "fit" &
  data_df_partial$tick == 10000,
]

sub_df$diff_from_shift <- sub_df$z_mean

szs <- sort(unique(sub_df$shift_size))

# store matrices for later use
mean_mats <- list()
var_mats  <- list()
count_mats <- list()

all_mean_vals <- c()
all_var_vals  <- c()

# -----------------------------
# build mean_mat and var_mat
# -----------------------------
for (sz in szs) {
  
  df_sz <- sub_df[sub_df$shift_size == sz, ]
  
  ns <- sort(unique(df_sz$n))
  psis <- sort(unique(df_sz$psi))
  
  # initialize
  mean_mat <- matrix(
    NA,
    nrow = length(ns),
    ncol = length(psis),
    dimnames = list(n = as.character(ns), psi = as.character(psis))
  )

  var_mat <- matrix(
    NA,
    nrow = length(ns),
    ncol = length(psis),
    dimnames = list(n = as.character(ns), psi = as.character(psis))
  )

  count_mat <- matrix(
    0,
    nrow = length(ns),
    ncol = length(psis),
    dimnames = list(n = as.character(ns), psi = as.character(psis))
  )
  
  for (i in seq_along(ns)) {
    for (j in seq_along(psis)) {
      
      vals <- df_sz$diff_from_shift[
        df_sz$n == ns[i] &
        df_sz$psi == psis[j]
      ]
      
      vals <- vals[is.finite(vals)]
      
      count_mat[i, j] <- length(vals)
      
      if (length(vals) >= 1) {
        mean_mat[i, j] <- mean(vals)
      }
      
      if (length(vals) >= 2) {
        var_mat[i, j] <- var(vals)
      }
    }
  }
  
  mean_mats[[as.character(sz)]] <- mean_mat
  var_mats[[as.character(sz)]]  <- var_mat
  count_mats[[as.character(sz)]] <- count_mat
  
  all_mean_vals <- c(all_mean_vals, as.vector(mean_mat))
  all_var_vals  <- c(all_var_vals, as.vector(var_mat))

  cat("\n============================\n")
  cat("shift_size =", sz, "\n")
  cat("Count matrix (number of reps per cell):\n")
  print(count_mat)
  
  # optional: save matrices
  write.table(
    mean_mat,
    file = file.path(plot_folder, paste0("mean_matrix_sz_", sz, ".tsv")),
    sep = "\t",
    quote = FALSE
  )
  
  write.table(
    var_mat,
    file = file.path(plot_folder, paste0("var_matrix_sz_", sz, ".tsv")),
    sep = "\t",
    quote = FALSE
  )

  write.table(
    count_mat,
    file = file.path(plot_folder, paste0("count_matrix_sz_", sz, ".tsv")),
    sep = "\t",
    quote = FALSE
  )
}

mean_cols <- hcl.colors(100, "Berlin")
var_cols  <- hcl.colors(100, "YlOrRd")

draw_heatmap_with_colorbar <- function(zmat, xlabels, ylabels, cols, zlim,
                                       main, zlab = "") {
  
  x_idx <- seq_along(xlabels)
  y_idx <- seq_along(ylabels)
  
  layout(matrix(c(1, 2), nrow = 1), widths = c(1, 0.08))
  
  # -----------------------------
  # heatmap
  # -----------------------------
  par(mar = c(4.5, 4.5, 3, 1))
  
  image(
    x = x_idx,
    y = y_idx,
    z = zmat,
    col = cols,
    zlim = zlim,
    xaxt = "n",
    yaxt = "n",
    xlab = "Group size (n)",
    ylab = expression(psi),
    main = main
  )
  
  axis(1, at = x_idx, labels = xlabels)
  axis(2, at = y_idx, labels = ylabels)
  
  # grid lines
  abline(v = seq(0.5, length(xlabels) + 0.5, by = 1), col = "white", lwd = 1)
  abline(h = seq(0.5, length(ylabels) + 0.5, by = 1), col = "white", lwd = 1)
  
  box()
  
  # -----------------------------
  # color bar (FIXED)
  # -----------------------------
  par(mar = c(4.5, 1, 3, 3))
  
  ybar <- seq(zlim[1], zlim[2], length.out = length(cols))
  zbar <- matrix(ybar, nrow = 1)
  
  image(
    x = c(0, 1),
    y = ybar,
    z = zbar,
    col = cols,
    xaxt = "n",
    yaxt = "n",
    xlab = "",
    ylab = ""
  )
  
  axis(4)
  mtext(zlab, side = 4, line = 2)
  box()
}
# -----------------------------
# plot separate mean heatmaps
# -----------------------------
for (sz in szs) {
  
  mean_mat <- mean_mats[[as.character(sz)]]
  ns <- rownames(mean_mat)
  psis <- colnames(mean_mat)
  
  pdf(file.path(plot_folder, paste0("mean_heatmap_sz_", sz, ".pdf")),
      width = 13, height = 10)
# shift-size specific zlim
mean_zlim <- range(mean_mat, na.rm = TRUE)

  draw_heatmap_with_colorbar(
    zmat = mean_mat,
    xlabels = ns,
    ylabels = psis,
    cols = mean_cols,
    zlim = mean_zlim,
    main = paste("Mean(shift_size - z_mean)\nshift_size =", sz),
    zlab = "Mean diff"
  )

  dev.off()
}

# -----------------------------
# plot separate variance heatmaps
# -----------------------------
for (sz in szs) {
  
  var_mat <- var_mats[[as.character(sz)]]
  ns <- rownames(var_mat)
  psis <- colnames(var_mat)
  
  # shift-size specific zlim
  var_zlim <- range(var_mat, na.rm = TRUE)

  pdf(file.path(plot_folder, paste0("var_heatmap_sz_", sz, ".pdf")),
      width = 13, height = 10)

  draw_heatmap_with_colorbar(
    zmat = var_mat,
    xlabels = ns,
    ylabels = psis,
    cols = var_cols,
    zlim = var_zlim,
    main = paste("Var(shift_size - z_mean)\nshift_size =", sz),
    zlab = "Variance"
  )

  dev.off()
}
```


```{r}
plot_folder <- file.path(base_plot_folder, "diff_vs_n_by_sz")
dir.create(plot_folder, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

# unique values
szs <- sort(unique(sub_df$shift_size))
psi_vals <- sort(unique(sub_df$psi))

cols <- met.brewer(name = met_brewer_pallete, n = length(psi_vals), type = "discrete")

for (sz in szs) {
  pdf(file.path(plot_folder, paste0("diff_vs_n_sz_", sz, ".pdf")), width = 11.5, height = 8)

  df_sz <- sub_df[sub_df$shift_size == sz, ]
  # define grid
  ns <- sort(unique(df_sz$n))
  psis <- sort(unique(df_sz$psi))

  # initialize matrix
  var_mat <- matrix(
    NA,
    nrow = length(ns),
    ncol = length(psis),
    dimnames = list(n = ns, psi = psis)
  )
  # empty plot
  plot(
    NA, NA,
    xlim = range(df_sz$n),
    ylim = range(df_sz$diff_from_shift, na.rm = TRUE),
    xlab = "Group size (n)",
    ylab = "shift_size - z_mean",
    main = paste("shift_size =", sz)
  )

  for (i in seq_along(ns)) {
    for (j in seq_along(psis)) {
      
      vals <- df_sz$diff_from_shift[
        df_sz$n == ns[i] &
        df_sz$psi == psis[j]
      ]
      
      vals <- vals[is.finite(vals)]
      
      if (length(vals) >= 2) {
        var_mat[i, j] <- var(vals)
      }
    }
  }
  
  # plot each psi
  for (i in seq_along(psi_vals)) {
    
    psi_val <- psi_vals[i]
    df_psi <- df_sz[df_sz$psi == psi_val, ]
    
    # scatter points
    points(
      jitter(df_psi$n, amount = 0.2),
      df_psi$diff_from_shift,
      col = adjustcolor(cols[i], alpha.f = 0.4),
      pch = 16
    )
    
    # compute mean and sd per n
    means <- tapply(df_psi$diff_from_shift, df_psi$n, mean, na.rm = TRUE)
    sds   <- tapply(df_psi$diff_from_shift, df_psi$n, sd,   na.rm = TRUE)
    
    x_vals <- as.numeric(names(means))
    y_vals <- means
    
    # mean line
    lines(
      x_vals,
      y_vals,
      col = cols[i],
      lwd = 2
    )
    
    # error bars (±1 SD)
    arrows(
      x_vals,
      y_vals - sds,
      x_vals,
      y_vals + sds,
      angle = 90,
      code = 3,
      length = 0.05,
      col = cols[i],
      lwd = 1.5
    )
  }
  
  legend(
    "topright",
    legend = paste0("psi = ", psi_vals),
    col = cols,
    pch = 16,
    lwd = 2,
    bty = "n"
  )
  
  abline(h = 0, lty = 2)
  dev.off()
}


```

```{r}
plot_folder <- file.path(base_plot_folder, "fit_crossing_generation")
dir.create(plot_folder, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

# ---------------------------------
# filter to fit model
# ---------------------------------
fit_df <- data_df_partial[data_df_partial$reg == "fit", ]

reps <- sort(unique(fit_df$rep))

szs <- sort(unique(agg_df$shift_size))

# helper: first crossing from negative to >= 0
find_crossing_tick <- function(tick, diff_vec) {
  keep <- is.finite(tick) & is.finite(diff_vec)
  tick <- tick[keep]
  diff_vec <- diff_vec[keep]
  
  if (length(tick) < 2) return(NA_real_)
  
  ord <- order(tick)
  tick <- tick[ord]
  diff_vec <- diff_vec[ord]
  
  idx <- which(diff_vec[-length(diff_vec)] < 0 & diff_vec[-1] >= 0)
  
  if (length(idx) == 0) return(NA_real_)
  
  tick[idx[1] + 1]
}
results_list <- list()

for (sz in szs) {
  
  df_sz <- fit_df[fit_df$shift_size == sz, ]
  ns <- sort(unique(df_sz$n))
  psi_vals <- sort(unique(df_sz$psi))
  psi_vals_plot <- psi_vals[psi_vals != 0]
  
  result_df <- data.frame()
  
  for (n_val in ns) {
    for (psi_val in psi_vals_plot) {
      
      for (rep in reps) {
        
        df_rep <- df_sz[df_sz$rep == rep & df_sz$n == n_val, ]
        
        base <- df_rep[df_rep$psi == 0, c("tick", "z_opt")]
        psi_d <- df_rep[df_rep$psi == psi_val, c("tick", "z_opt")]
        
        merged <- merge(base, psi_d, by = "tick",
                        suffixes = c("_base", "_psi"))
        
        if (nrow(merged) < 2) next
        
        diff_vec <- merged$z_opt_psi - merged$z_opt_base
        
        ct <- find_crossing_tick(merged$tick, diff_vec)
        
        if (is.finite(ct)) {
          result_df <- rbind(
            result_df,
            data.frame(
              n = n_val,
              psi = psi_val,
              rep = rep,
              cross_tick = ct
            )
          )
        }
      }
    }
  }
  
  results_list[[as.character(sz)]] <- result_df
}

for (sz in szs) {
  
  df_plot_all <- results_list[[as.character(sz)]]
  
  psi_vals_plot <- sort(unique(df_plot_all$psi))
  cols <- hcl.colors(length(psi_vals_plot), "Zissou 1")
  
  y_lim <- range(df_plot_all$cross_tick, na.rm = TRUE)
  
  pdf(file.path(plot_folder, paste0("crossing_generation_sz_", sz, "_w_points_zoomed.pdf")),
      width = 11.5, height = 8)
  
  plot(
    NA, NA,
    xlim = range(df_plot_all$n),
    ylim = c(10000, 10040),
    xlab = "Group size (n)",
    ylab = "Crossing generation",
    main = paste("Crossing generation (rep-level)\nshift_size =", sz)
  )
  
  for (j in seq_along(psi_vals_plot)) {
    
    psi_val <- psi_vals_plot[j]
    df_psi <- df_plot_all[df_plot_all$psi == psi_val, ]
    
    # jitter x so points don't overlap
    points(
      jitter(df_psi$n, amount = 0.2),
      df_psi$cross_tick,
      col = adjustcolor(cols[j], alpha.f = 0.5),
      pch = 16
    )
    
    # optional: mean line
    means <- tapply(df_psi$cross_tick, df_psi$n, mean, na.rm = TRUE)
    
    lines(
      as.numeric(names(means)),
      means,
      col = cols[j],
      lwd = 2
    )
  }
  
  legend(
    "topright",
    legend = paste0("psi = ", psi_vals_plot),
    col = cols,
    pch = 16,
    lwd = 2,
    bty = "n"
  )
  
  dev.off()
}
```


```{r}
colname = c("a_sd", "n")  # column to plot
plot_folder = file.path(base_plot_folder, paste(colname, collapse = "_"))

if (!dir.exists(plot_folder)) {
  dir.create(plot_folder, recursive = TRUE)
}

for (r in c("fit", "ext", "ave")) {
    pre_data <- data_df[
      data_df$tick >= 9970 &
      data_df$tick <= 9999 &
      data_df$reg == r &
      data_df$psi %in% c(0.0, 0.2, 0.5, 0.8) &
      data_df$n %in% c(2, 5, 8, 20),
    ]
    
    filt_A <- list(reg = r, psi = 0.0)
    filt_B <- list(reg = r, psi = 0.2)
    filt_C <- list(reg = r, psi = 0.5)
    filt_D <- list(reg = r, psi = 0.8)
    pdf(file.path(plot_folder, paste0("reg_", r, ".pdf")), width = 11.5, height = 8)

    title <- paste0(
    if (r == "inv") "Homogenous group" else
        if (r == "fit") "copy the best" else
        if (r == "ext") "copy the extreme" else
            if (r == "ave") "copy the average",
    " model"
    )

    par(cex.axis = 2.5, cex.lab = 2.5, cex.main = 1.0, mar = c(6, 6, 3, 1) + 0.2, mgp = c(3.8, 1.5, 0))

    fils = list(filt_A, filt_B, filt_C, filt_D)
    plot_lines_multi(
        df      = pre_data,
        filters = fils,
        ycol    = "a_sd",  # << choose the column to plot
        labels  = list(
            title = title,
            x = "n",  # or any x label you want
            y = expression(g[sd])      # or any y label you want
        ),
        show_rep = TRUE,       # faded per-rep lines? TRUE/FALSE
        cols = met.brewer(name=met_brewer_pallete, n=length(fils), type="discrete"),
        ylim = c(8, 12),
        xlim = c(2, 20),
        xcol = "n",
        ltys = ltys
    )
    
    # abline(a = 0, b = 1, lty = 2, col = "black", lwd = 2)

    leg_expr <- as.expression(lapply(fils, function(v) bquote(psi == .(v$psi))))
    legend("topright", bty = "n", legend = leg_expr,
        col = met.brewer(name=met_brewer_pallete, n=length(fils), type="discrete"),
        lwd = 3, cex = 2.2)
    dev.off()
}
```


```{r}
pre_shift_data_df <- data_df[data_df$tick >= 9970 & data_df$tick <= 9999, ]

for (reg in c("ave", "ext", "fit")){
  for (n in c(8, 50)){
    for (psi in c(0.5, 0.9)){
      after_filter_data <- pre_shift_data_df[
        pre_shift_data_df$n == n &
        pre_shift_data_df$reg == reg &
        pre_shift_data_df$psi == psi, 
      ]
      for (col in c("fitness_mean_norm","abs_effect_mean", "abs_effect_sd", "num_seg_mean", "num_seg_sd", "seg_site_pop")){
        # get the average and sd of each column across ticks and reps in the after_filter_data df and print them in a nice format
        # avg_value <- mean(after_filter_data[[col]], na.rm = TRUE)
        # sd_value <- sd(after_filter_data[[col]], na.rm = TRUE)
        # cat(paste0("reg = ", reg,", n = ", n, ", psi = ", psi, ", col = ", col, ": ", round(avg_value, 4), " (", round(sd_value, 4), ")\n"))
      }
      cat("--------------------------------------------------\n")
    }
  }
}

```

```{r}
# pre-shift window
pre_shift_data_df <- data_df[data_df$tick <= 9999, ]

# output folder
out_dir <- file.path(base_plot_folder, "pre_shift_summary_trends")
dir.create(out_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

# metrics to plot (rows)
plot_cols <- c(
  "fitness_mean",
  "abs_effect_mean",
  "abs_effect_sd",
  "num_seg_mean",
  "num_seg_sd",
  "seg_site_pop"
)

# # metrics to plot (rows)
# plot_cols <- c(
#   "a_sd",
#   "num_fixed_mut",
#   "z_sd",
#   "num_seg_mean",
#   "num_seg_sd",
#   "seg_site_pop"
# )

# nicer y-axis labels
ylab_map <- list(
  fitness_mean    = "Average fitness",
  abs_effect_mean = expression(paste("|g| mean")),
  abs_effect_sd   = expression(paste("|g| sd")),
  num_seg_mean    = "Seg. sites / individual (mean)",
  num_seg_sd      = "Seg. sites / individual (sd)",
  seg_site_pop    = "Total seg. sites",
  a_sd            = expression(g[sd]),
  z_sd            = expression(z[sd]),
  num_fixed_mut   = "Number of fixed mutations"
)

col_combos <- data.frame(
  reg = rep(c("ave", "ext", "fit"), each = 2),
  n   = rep(c(8, 20), times = 3),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

# psi values by model
psi_map <- list(
  ave = c(0, 0.1, 0.2, 0.3, 0.5, 0.7, 0.8, 0.9),
  fit = c(0, 0.1, 0.2, 0.3, 0.5, 0.7, 0.8, 0.9),
  ext = c(0, 0.1, 0.2, 0.3, 0.5, 0.7, 0.8, 0.9)   # add extra ext psi values here
)

# common x range across all panels
all_psi_vals <- sort(unique(unlist(psi_map)))

# helper for drawing error bars
draw_error_bars <- function(x, y, y_sd, cap = 0.03) {
  ok <- !(is.na(x) | is.na(y) | is.na(y_sd))
  if (!any(ok)) return(invisible(NULL))
  
  arrows(
    x0 = x[ok], y0 = y[ok] - y_sd[ok],
    x1 = x[ok], y1 = y[ok] + y_sd[ok],
    angle = 90, code = 3, length = cap
  )
}

# precompute summaries:
# summary_list[[col]][[panel_index]] = list(psi=..., mean=..., sd=...)
summary_list <- vector("list", length(plot_cols))
names(summary_list) <- plot_cols

for (col in plot_cols) {
  summary_list[[col]] <- vector("list", nrow(col_combos))
  
  for (j in seq_len(nrow(col_combos))) {
    reg_j <- col_combos$reg[j]
    n_j   <- col_combos$n[j]
    psi_vals_j <- psi_map[[reg_j]]
    
    mean_vals <- rep(NA_real_, length(psi_vals_j))
    sd_vals   <- rep(NA_real_, length(psi_vals_j))
    
    for (i in seq_along(psi_vals_j)) {
      psi_i <- psi_vals_j[i]
      
      sub_df <- pre_shift_data_df[
        pre_shift_data_df$reg == reg_j &
        pre_shift_data_df$n   == n_j &
        pre_shift_data_df$psi == psi_i,
      ]
      
      if (nrow(sub_df) > 0) {
        mean_vals[i] <- mean(sub_df[[col]], na.rm = TRUE)
        sd_vals[i]   <- sd(sub_df[[col]], na.rm = TRUE)
      }
    }
    
    summary_list[[col]][[j]] <- list(
      psi  = psi_vals_j,
      mean = mean_vals,
      sd   = sd_vals
    )
  }
}

# one common y-limit per row
row_ylims <- vector("list", length(plot_cols))
names(row_ylims) <- plot_cols

for (col in plot_cols) {
  all_ymin <- c()
  all_ymax <- c()
  
  for (j in seq_len(nrow(col_combos))) {
    mean_vals <- summary_list[[col]][[j]]$mean
    sd_vals   <- summary_list[[col]][[j]]$sd
    
    ok <- !(is.na(mean_vals) | is.na(sd_vals))
    if (any(ok)) {
      all_ymin <- c(all_ymin, mean_vals[ok] - sd_vals[ok])
      all_ymax <- c(all_ymax, mean_vals[ok] + sd_vals[ok])
    }
  }
  
  ymin <- min(all_ymin, na.rm = TRUE)
  ymax <- max(all_ymax, na.rm = TRUE)
  yrng <- ymax - ymin
  if (!is.finite(yrng) || yrng == 0) yrng <- 1
  
  row_ylims[[col]] <- c(
    ymin - 0.08 * yrng,
    ymax + 0.08 * yrng
  )
}

# output file
pdf(
  file.path(out_dir, "pre_shift_summary_trends_multipanel.pdf"),
  width = 18, height = 16
)

par(
  mfrow = c(length(plot_cols), nrow(col_combos)),
  mar = c(2.2, 2.6, 2.0, 0.8),
  oma = c(4, 6, 3, 1)
)

for (r in seq_along(plot_cols)) {
  col_name <- plot_cols[r]
  ylim_use <- row_ylims[[col_name]]
  
  for (j in seq_len(nrow(col_combos))) {
    reg_j <- col_combos$reg[j]
    n_j   <- col_combos$n[j]
    
    psi_vals_j <- summary_list[[col_name]][[j]]$psi
    mean_vals  <- summary_list[[col_name]][[j]]$mean
    sd_vals    <- summary_list[[col_name]][[j]]$sd
    
    plot(
      psi_vals_j, mean_vals,
      type = "b",
      pch = 16,
      lwd = 2,
      xaxt = "n",
      yaxt = "n",
      xlab = "",
      ylab = "",
      xlim = range(all_psi_vals),
      ylim = ylim_use
    )
    
    draw_error_bars(psi_vals_j, mean_vals, sd_vals)
    abline(v = 0, lty = 2, col = "grey50")
    
    # x-axis only on bottom row
    if (r == length(plot_cols)) {
      axis(1, at = psi_vals_j, labels = psi_vals_j, cex.axis = 0.9)
    } else {
      axis(1, at = psi_vals_j, labels = FALSE, tck = -0.02)
    }
    
    # y-axis only on first column
    if (j == 1) {
      axis(2, cex.axis = 0.9)
      mtext(ylab_map[[col_name]], side = 2, line = 3.8, cex = 0.9)
    } else {
      axis(2, labels = FALSE, tck = -0.02)
    }
    
    # titles only on top row
    if (r == 1) {
      title(main = paste0(reg_j, ", n = ", n_j), cex.main = 1)
    }
    
    box()
  }
}

mtext(expression(psi), side = 1, outer = TRUE, line = 2.2, cex = 1.2)
mtext("Pre-shift summary statistics", side = 3, outer = TRUE, line = 1, cex = 1.3)

dev.off()
```


```{r}
# post-shift window
post_shift_data_df <- data_df[data_df$tick >= 10000 & data_df$tick <= 10300 & data_df$shift_size == 20, ]

# output folder
out_dir <- file.path(base_plot_folder, "post_shift_summary_compare")
dir.create(out_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

# metrics to plot (rows)
plot_cols <- c(
  "fitness_mean",
  "abs_effect_mean",
  "abs_effect_sd",
  "num_seg_mean",
  "num_seg_sd",
  "seg_site_pop"
)

# nicer y-axis labels
ylab_map <- list(
  fitness_mean    = "Average fitness",
  abs_effect_mean = expression(paste("|g| mean")),
  abs_effect_sd   = expression(paste("|g| sd")),
  num_seg_mean    = "Seg. sites / individual (mean)",
  num_seg_sd      = "Seg. sites / individual (sd)",
  seg_site_pop    = "Total seg. sites"
)

col_combos <- data.frame(
  reg = rep(c("ave", "ext", "fit"), each = 2),
  n   = rep(c(8, 20), times = 3),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

# --------------------------------------------------
# psi values by model
# --------------------------------------------------
psi_map <- list(
  ave = c(0, 0.1, 0.2, 0.3, 0.5, 0.7, 0.8, 0.9),
  fit = c(0, 0.1, 0.2, 0.3, 0.5, 0.7, 0.8, 0.9),
  ext = c(0, 0.1, 0.2, 0.3, 0.5, 0.7, 0.8, 0.9)   # add extra ext psi values here
)


# for common x range across panels
all_psi_vals <- sort(unique(unlist(psi_map)))

# --------------------------------------------------
# CUSTOMIZE THESE TICKS
# --------------------------------------------------
tick_points <- c(
  start = 10000,
  mid1  = 10010,
  end   = 10020
)

point_cols <- c(
  start = "black",
  mid1  = "dodgerblue3",
  end   = "red3"
)

point_pchs <- c(
  start = 16,
  mid1  = 15,
  end   = 18
)

point_ltys <- c(
  start = 1,
  mid1  = 1,
  end   = 1
)

draw_error_bars <- function(x, y, y_sd, cap = 0.03, col = "black") {
  ok <- !(is.na(x) | is.na(y) | is.na(y_sd))
  if (!any(ok)) return(invisible(NULL))
  
  arrows(
    x0 = x[ok], y0 = y[ok] - y_sd[ok],
    x1 = x[ok], y1 = y[ok] + y_sd[ok],
    angle = 90, code = 3, length = cap, col = col
  )
}

# summary structure:
# summary_list[[col]][[tick_name]][[panel_index]] = list(psi=..., mean=..., sd=...)
summary_list <- vector("list", length(plot_cols))
names(summary_list) <- plot_cols

for (col in plot_cols) {
  summary_list[[col]] <- vector("list", length(tick_points))
  names(summary_list[[col]]) <- names(tick_points)
  
  for (pname in names(tick_points)) {
    tick_val <- tick_points[[pname]]
    summary_list[[col]][[pname]] <- vector("list", nrow(col_combos))
    
    for (j in seq_len(nrow(col_combos))) {
      reg_j <- col_combos$reg[j]
      n_j   <- col_combos$n[j]
      
      psi_vals_j <- psi_map[[reg_j]]
      mean_vals  <- rep(NA_real_, length(psi_vals_j))
      sd_vals    <- rep(NA_real_, length(psi_vals_j))
      
      for (i in seq_along(psi_vals_j)) {
        psi_i <- psi_vals_j[i]
        
        sub_df <- post_shift_data_df[
          post_shift_data_df$reg  == reg_j &
          post_shift_data_df$n    == n_j &
          post_shift_data_df$psi  == psi_i &
          post_shift_data_df$tick == tick_val,
        ]
        
        if (nrow(sub_df) > 0) {
          mean_vals[i] <- mean(sub_df[[col]], na.rm = TRUE)
          sd_vals[i]   <- sd(sub_df[[col]], na.rm = TRUE)
        }
      }
      
      summary_list[[col]][[pname]][[j]] <- list(
        psi  = psi_vals_j,
        mean = mean_vals,
        sd   = sd_vals
      )
    }
  }
}

# one common y-limit per row, across all selected ticks and all panels
row_ylims <- vector("list", length(plot_cols))
names(row_ylims) <- plot_cols

for (col in plot_cols) {
  all_ymin <- c()
  all_ymax <- c()
  
  for (pname in names(tick_points)) {
    for (j in seq_len(nrow(col_combos))) {
      mean_vals <- summary_list[[col]][[pname]][[j]]$mean
      sd_vals   <- summary_list[[col]][[pname]][[j]]$sd
      
      ok <- !(is.na(mean_vals) | is.na(sd_vals))
      if (any(ok)) {
        all_ymin <- c(all_ymin, mean_vals[ok] - sd_vals[ok])
        all_ymax <- c(all_ymax, mean_vals[ok] + sd_vals[ok])
      }
    }
  }
  
  ymin <- min(all_ymin, na.rm = TRUE)
  ymax <- max(all_ymax, na.rm = TRUE)
  yrng <- ymax - ymin
  
  if (!is.finite(yrng) || yrng == 0) yrng <- 1
  
  row_ylims[[col]] <- c(
    ymin - 0.08 * yrng,
    ymax + 0.08 * yrng
  )
}

# output file
pdf(
  file.path(out_dir, "post_shift_summary_compare_multipanel.pdf"),
  width = 18, height = 16
)

par(
  mfrow = c(length(plot_cols), nrow(col_combos)),
  mar = c(2.2, 2.6, 2.0, 0.8),
  oma = c(4, 6, 4, 1)
)

for (r in seq_along(plot_cols)) {
  col_name <- plot_cols[r]
  ylim_use <- row_ylims[[col_name]]
  
  for (j in seq_len(nrow(col_combos))) {
    reg_j <- col_combos$reg[j]
    n_j   <- col_combos$n[j]
    psi_vals_j <- psi_map[[reg_j]]
    
    plot(
      NA, NA,
      xlim = range(all_psi_vals),
      ylim = ylim_use,
      xaxt = "n",
      yaxt = "n",
      xlab = "",
      ylab = ""
    )
    
    for (pname in names(tick_points)) {
      psi_vals  <- summary_list[[col_name]][[pname]][[j]]$psi
      mean_vals <- summary_list[[col_name]][[pname]][[j]]$mean
      sd_vals   <- summary_list[[col_name]][[pname]][[j]]$sd
      
      lines(
        psi_vals, mean_vals,
        type = "b",
        pch = point_pchs[pname],
        lwd = 2,
        lty = point_ltys[pname],
        col = point_cols[pname]
      )
      
      draw_error_bars(
        psi_vals, mean_vals, sd_vals,
        col = point_cols[pname]
      )
    }
    
    abline(v = 0, lty = 2, col = "grey50")
    
    # x-axis only on bottom row
    if (r == length(plot_cols)) {
      axis(1, at = psi_vals_j, labels = psi_vals_j, cex.axis = 0.9)
    } else {
      axis(1, at = psi_vals_j, labels = FALSE, tck = -0.02)
    }
    
    # y-axis only on first column
    if (j == 1) {
      axis(2, cex.axis = 0.9)
      mtext(ylab_map[[col_name]], side = 2, line = 3.8, cex = 0.9)
    } else {
      axis(2, labels = FALSE, tck = -0.02)
    }
    
    if (r == 1) {
      title(main = paste0(reg_j, ", n = ", n_j), cex.main = 1)
    }
    
    box()
  }
}

legend(
  "top",
  inset = -0.02,
  xpd = NA,
  horiz = TRUE,
  bty = "n",
  legend = paste0(names(tick_points), " (", tick_points, ")"),
  col = point_cols[names(tick_points)],
  pch = point_pchs[names(tick_points)],
  lty = point_ltys[names(tick_points)],
  lwd = 2,
  cex = 1.0
)

mtext(expression(psi), side = 1, outer = TRUE, line = 2.2, cex = 1.2)
mtext("Post-shift summary statistics at selected generations", side = 3, outer = TRUE, line = 1.5, cex = 1.3)

dev.off()
```


## discarded
```{r}
data_df$a_z_diff <- data_df$z_mean - data_df$a_mean
```

```{r, echo=FALSE}
data_df$fitness_mean_norm <- data_df$fitness_mean / 0.0087186
data_df$fitness_sd_norm <- data_df$fitness_sd / 0.0005019642

```

```{r}
data_df$a_var <- data_df$a_sd^2
data_df$z_var <- data_df$z_sd^2
```

```{r}
plot_folder = paste0(base_plot_folder, "reach90/")
if(!dir.exists(plot_folder)) {
  dir.create(plot_folder, recursive = TRUE)
}

for (n in c(2, 5, 8, 20, 50)) {
  for (sz in c(20, 40, 60)) {
    for (reg in c("fit", "ext", "ave")) {
      
      filt_A <- list(reg = reg, psi = 0.0, n = n, shift_size = sz)
      filt_B <- list(reg = reg, psi = 0.5, n = n, shift_size = sz)
      filt_C <- list(reg = reg, psi = 0.9, n = n, shift_size = sz)
      
      pdf(
        paste0(plot_folder, "reach90_reg_", reg, "_n_", n, "_sz_", sz, ".pdf"),
        width = 11.5, height = 8
      )
      
      title <- paste0(
          if (reg == "fit") "copy the best" else
            if (reg == "ext") "copy the extreme" else
              if (reg == "ave") "copy the average",
        " model (n = ", n, ", shift size = ", sz, ")"
      )
      
      par(
        cex.axis = 2.5, cex.lab = 2.5, cex.main = 1.0,
        mar = c(6, 6, 3, 1) + 0.2,
        mgp = c(3.8, 1.5, 0)
      )
      
      leg_expr <- as.expression(
        lapply(c(filt_A$psi, filt_B$psi, filt_C$psi),
               function(v) bquote(psi == .(v)))
      )
      
      plot_reach_tick_multi(
        df = data_df,
        filters = list(filt_A, filt_B, filt_C),
        labels = list(
          title = title,
          x = "Tick reaching 90% of new optimum",
          y = "Number of replicates"
        ),
        frac = 0.9,
        shift_tick = 10000,
        ycol = "z_mean",
        opt_col = "optimum",
        tick_col = "tick",
        rep_col = "rep",
        cols = c(
          hcl.colors(3, hcl_color_palette)[1],
          hcl.colors(3, hcl_color_palette)[2],
          hcl.colors(3, hcl_color_palette)[3]
        ),
        pchs = c(16, 16, 16),
        plot_type = "points",
        xlim = c(10000, 10300),
        ylim = NULL,
        legend_labels = leg_expr,
        legend_loc = "topright"
      )
      
      dev.off()
    }
  }
}
```
